name: zpwrchrome
description: Browser power-tool: UNIX `pass` integration (browserpass-compatible), segmented download manager that replaces Chrome's default, JetBrains-style tab switcher with MRU + scenes + opener-tree + minimap, fzf history search, and Tampermonkey-equivalent userscripts. Cyberpunk HUD by MenkeTechnologies.
author: MenkeTechnologies

switch-previous-tab.description: Switch to the previously active tab (MRU)

restore-last-closed.description: Restore the most recently closed tab

recent-modal.description: Open the recent-tabs popup (same as Alt+T — user-bindable)

open-history.description: Open the popup focused on the History category (fzf-search browsing history)

search-tabs.description: Open popup focused on the tab search box

jump-to-1.description: Jump to tab #1 in current window

jump-to-2.description: Jump to tab #2 in current window

jump-to-3.description: Jump to tab #3 in current window

jump-to-4.description: Jump to tab #4 in current window

jump-to-5.description: Jump to tab #5 in current window

jump-to-6.description: Jump to tab #6 in current window

jump-to-7.description: Jump to tab #7 in current window

jump-to-8.description: Jump to tab #8 in current window

jump-to-9.description: Jump to last tab in current window

pin-tab.description: Toggle pin on the active tab

mute-tab.description: Toggle mute on the active tab

move-to-new-window.description: Detach active tab to a new window

close-others.description: Close all other tabs in current window

close-right.description: Close all tabs to the right of the active tab

close-duplicates.description: Close tabs with duplicate URLs (keeps leftmost)

reload-all.description: Reload every tab in current window

sort-by-url.description: Sort tabs in current window by URL

group-by-domain.description: Group tabs in current window by domain (Chrome tab groups)

copy-url.description: Copy active tab URL to clipboard

copy-title-md.description: Copy active tab as Markdown link

bookmark-tab.description: Bookmark active tab to Other Bookmarks

save-scene-prompt.description: Open popup focused on save-scene input

restore-scene-1.description: Restore scene #1 (newest) — opens a new window with saved tabs

kill-heaviest.description: Close the open tab consuming the most memory (Chrome dev/canary only — requires chrome.processes API)

pass-open-popup.description: Open popup focused on the PASS category (matches credentials for the active tab from ~/.password-store via the zpwrchrome native host)

pass-fill.description: Autofill the best-matching `pass` credential into the active tab's login form (requires the native host) — customize at chrome://extensions/shortcuts

pass-copy-pw.description: Copy the best-matching `pass` password for the active tab to the clipboard (auto-clears after 45 s)

pass-copy-user.description: Copy the best-matching `pass` username for the active tab to the clipboard

pass-copy-otp.description: Copy the TOTP code for the best-matching `pass` entry to the clipboard

pass-open-url.description: Navigate the active tab to the URL stored in the best-matching `pass` entry (parses url/link/website/web/site keys)

screenshot-full-page.description: Full-page screenshot — scrolls the active tab in viewport-sized steps and stitches into one PNG (no extra permissions required; customize at chrome://extensions/shortcuts)

dl-paste-url.description: Download the URL currently on the clipboard via the zpwrchrome segmented downloader

dl-show-queue.description: Open the zpwrchrome download manager queue view

dl-pause-all.description: Pause every active download in the zpwrchrome download manager

dl-resume-all.description: Resume every paused download in the zpwrchrome download manager
